data.text: I've completed the analysis. Here's the report:

data.content:
# Market Analysis Report

## Executive Summary

The market shows strong growth with 15% year-over-year increase across all segments.

## Key Findings

1. Cloud adoption accelerating
2. AI integration as top priority
3. Cybersecurity investments at record levels

## Recommendations

- Invest in cloud infrastructure
- Build AI capabilities early
